image_prompts.prompt: Hook visual: Apoptosis: the secret behind healthy organs.
Context visual: This controlled cell self-destruction isn’t just a process; it’s life’s blueprint.
Escalation visual: Imagine thousands of cells dying at the right moment, shaping your organs.
Evidence visual: Research shows that apoptosis also prevents diseases like cancer.
Payoff visual: So, programmed cell death isn’t just normal; it’s crucial for our health.
Cta visual: Curious about more amazing science facts? Hit that follow button!
